title: Add AI preview + landing page URL links to LeadsTable row expansion
brief:
In the LeadsTable expanded row, add two link rows under the Lead ID / Source / UTM grid:

1. **AI CaseChecker preview** — when `lead.attorneyAccountId` is set, link to `https://casesdaily.com/c/<attorney.slug>/ai?preview=1`. The attorney slug is NOT currently on EnrichedGHLLead; the link should construct via `/api/admin/attorneys/<id>/preview-url` so the slug lookup happens server-side, OR rely on a passed-in `attorneySlugById: Record<string,string>` prop. Pick the simpler path: add an optional `attorneySlugById` prop to LeadsTable, and the parent page (admin/dashboard/leads/page.tsx) will populate it via a single Supabase query before rendering.

2. **Original landing page** — when the lead came in via the funnel (`lead.casesdailyLeadId` is set), show the URL the lead actually filled the form on. Add an optional `casesdailyLeadInfoById: Record<string, { landing_page_url: string | null; referrer_url: string | null }>` prop similarly. The parent page populates by querying casesdaily_leads via the FK.

These links should live in a new 'Sources & Preview' section in the expansion, with copy buttons next to each URL. Use the existing Field / Label primitives. Keep light theme + the same row tone treatment (tints carry through).

Also update the admin Leads page (casesdaily/src/app/admin/dashboard/leads/page.tsx) to fetch the two maps and pass them as props.
outputContract:

2. **Files** — fenced blocks per file changed (the new LeadsTable.tsx and the new admin leads page.tsx):

3. **Verification** — 3 bullets.

Do not break existing props or behavior. Light theme + plain Tailwind.
